title: elatostema nasutum var. puberulum
intro: Elatostema nasutum var. puberulum, also known as the hairy crested Polyspora, is a plant species in the nettle family Urticaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Elatostema nasutum var. puberulum include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
